case_title: WENDY DRUCKER ET AL VS. ESM INC., DBA DOSA ON FILLMORE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF JOHN V. DRUCKEN RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRUCKER, JOHN V.
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-05-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-08-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $70.00 SERVED JUL-22-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESM INC., DBA DOSA ON FILLMORE
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CHANGE DEFENDANT'S NAME FROM: "ECM INC" TO "ESM INC" FILED BY PLAINTIFF DRUCKER, JOHN V.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-25-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRUCKER, WENDY DRUCKER, JOHN V. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESM INC., DBA DOSA ON FILLMORE $2,625.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,785.00, CONCURRENTLY WITH PAYMENT OF THIS JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFFS SHALL TURN OVER TO DEFENDANT AT 1700 FILLMORE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121, THE LEATHER JACKET WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,750.00 FILED BY DRUCKER, WENDY DRUCKER, JOHN V. AS TO DEFENDANT ESM INC., DBA DOSA ON FILLMORE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ESM INC., DBA DOSA ON FILLMORE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-25-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANDREW O'DAY--GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
